assessor_raw:
## Baseline Assessment (Run 3): Transformer vs. TF-IDF for Multi-Label ICD-10 Coding

Two explicit methodological violations are present in this design. Section 3 fits TF-IDF vocabulary and IDF weights on the full corpus before splitting — this leaks future encounter statistics into the baseline's feature representation. Section 6 uses test-set performance to select hyperparameters and thresholds — this renders the test set non-holdout and inflates reported results. The design is otherwise well-constructed. These two violations prevent valid conclusions.

**Assessment: critique_wins**
